recap: Created filetypes-key autoload: derives FILETYPES lookup key from filename, writing to $REPLY — dotfiles get dot→underscore transform, regular files get lowercased extension.
Added dotfile sub-weight to sort-filepaths: regular files get 'a', dotfiles get 'b', so dotfiles always sort after regular files at root and within subdirs.
Replaced inline extension extraction with filetypes-key call in fzf-colorize-path — dotfiles like .fdignore now resolve to their _-prefixed key and render in their defined FILETYPES color.

Replaced inline extension extraction with filetypes-key call in fzf-preview-header — dotfiles like .fdignore now resolve to their _-prefixed key and render in their registered FILETYPES icon and color.
